name_cn:
Genuine Leather
New version gold logo Vitality Orange
Includes long shoulder strap
Mini Nappa Calfskin Flamenco Clutch
Model 11050S
23.9-9-18cm
The Flamenco Clutch, released in the 1970s, features a drawstring closure and a signature twisted knot. This mini version is made of Nappa calfskin.
Shoulder, crossbody, or handheld
Detachable and adjustable shoulder strap
Subtle magnetic closure
Gold suede lining
LOEWE gold or silver stamping
